headline: Assessing Whether Sempra (SRE) Still Looks Overvalued After Its Recent Share Price Moves
summary: Recent performance snapshot for Sempra (SRE) Sempra (SRE) closed at approximately US$91.42 in the latest session. The stock was up about 1.2% over the past day and 2.6% over the past week, while the past month shows a 2.4% decline. See our latest analysis for Sempra. Beyond the recent daily move, Sempra’s 1 year total shareholder return of 22.6% and 5 year total shareholder return of 50.5% suggest momentum has been gradually building, even as shorter term share price swings remain modest.
